items.prompt: performs polynomial operations and uses structure to identify factors, zeros, and end behavior in bounded cases
items.expected_evidence: perform polynomial operations and explain how the structure changes
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner carries out operations accurately and preserves the structural meaning of the resulting polynomial.

items.prompt: explains how factors, zeros, degree, and leading coefficient influence polynomial behavior and representation choice
items.expected_evidence: connect factors and zeros to graphical intercept behavior in bounded cases
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains polynomial behavior as structured algebra-function meaning, not only symbolic output.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to form_purpose_mismatch.
items.expected_evidence: choose or compare polynomial forms for a stated purpose such as finding zeros or reading end behavior
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies where a less useful polynomial form obscured the intended reasoning goal.

items.prompt: interprets a polynomial in a less-familiar algebraic, graphical, or contextual setting and selects a representation that reveals the needed structure
items.expected_evidence: identify degree, leading coefficient effects, and term structure in bounded polynomial expressions and graphs
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves coherent polynomial structure across representation and purpose.
